hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS:-}"; if [ -n "$f" ]; then for file in $f; do if [[ "$file" == *.dart ]] && [[ "$file" == *datasource* || "$file" == *data_source* || "$file" == *_response.dart || "$file" == *_request.dart ]]; then echo "⚠️  Code-generated file modified. Run: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs"; break; fi; done; fi; exit 0'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '_test\.dart$' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Test files must be created via the @test-writer agent (project rule, CLAUDE.md A.9). Cancel this Write and delegate to @test-writer (stack: mocktail + bloc_test). Approve only if @test-writer is already the author."}}' || true
